prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: Alright, listen up! This task you've been putting off all morning is no match for you. You're stronger, smarter, and more determined than you give yourself credit for. I know it seems daunting, but remember, every challenge is an opportunity for growth. Break it down into smaller steps, focus on one thing at a time, and soon you'll find yourself in the flow, making progress and feeling accomplished. You've got this! Now, take a deep breath, stand tall, and tackle that task head-on. You're capable of more than you know. Go get 'em, tiger!
